mapper.sql: id, dept_code, dept_name, parent_id, status, sort_order, remark, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select from departments where is_deleted = 0
and ( dept_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dept_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and parent_id is null
and parent_id = #{parentId}
order by sort_order asc, id asc
select from departments where is_deleted = 0 order by sort_order asc, id asc
select from departments where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select from departments where dept_code = #{deptCode} and is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from departments where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into departments(dept_code, dept_name, parent_id, status, sort_order, remark, is_deleted) values(#{deptCode}, #{deptName}, #{parentId}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.update: update departments set dept_name = #{deptName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update departments set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update departments set is_deleted = 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
